mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite f JOIN post p ON f.post_id = p.id AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1 WHERE f.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT p.id, p.title, LEFT(regexp_replace(p.content, '<[^>]*>', '', 'g'), 100) AS summary, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar AS author_avatar, b.id AS board_id, b.name AS board_name, p.view_count, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.is_pinned, p.is_featured, p.created_at FROM favorite f JOIN post p ON f.post_id = p.id AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1 JOIN "user" u ON p.author_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 JOIN board b ON p.board_id = b.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
